Write, schedule, and publish social medi: Write, schedule, and publish social media content.
You can obtain your API key from **Typef: You can obtain your API key from **Typefully Settings → API**.
Create cross-platform, single-post draft: Create cross-platform, single-post drafts with text and optional media URLs. For threads (multiple posts) or advanced control, use "Create Draft Advanced" instead.
Create multi-post threads with full cont: Create multi-post threads with full control. Supports threads (multiple posts), different content and media per post with pre-uploaded media IDs using JSON format. For single posts with simple text and media URLs, use "Create Draft Simple" instead.
Immediately publishes an existing draft: Immediately publishes an existing draft to all configured platforms.
Schedules an existing draft to be publis: Schedules an existing draft to be published at a specific time.
Retrieve a specific draft by its ID.
Uploads a media file (image, video, GIF,: Uploads a media file (image, video, GIF, or PDF) to Typefully. Returns a media ID that can be used when creating drafts.
Make a custom API call to a specific end: 将一个自定义 API 调用到一个特定的终点
The text content of the post.
Which platforms to publish to. At least: Which platforms to publish to. At least one platform must be selected.
An optional title for the draft (visible: An optional title for the draft (visible only in Typefully).
Tags to apply to the draft.
Generate a share URL for the draft.
Schedule the draft for a specific date/t: Schedule the draft for a specific date/time. Leave empty to save as draft.
URL of an X post to reply to.
A JSON object defining per-platform cont: A JSON object defining per-platform content. Each key is a platform name (x, linkedin, threads, bluesky, mastodon) with an object containing "enabled" (boolean) and "posts" (array of {text} objects). For threads/X, add multiple posts. X also supports "settings": {"reply_to_url": "..."}. Example: {"x": {"enabled": true, "posts": [{"text": "Tweet 1"}, {"text": "Tweet 2"}]}, "linkedin": {"enabled": true, "posts": [{"text": "LinkedIn post"}]}}
An optional title for the draft.
The ID of the draft to publish.
The ID of the draft to schedule.
The date and time to publish the draft (: The date and time to publish the draft (ISO 8601 format with timezone).
The ID of the draft to retrieve.
Maximum number of drafts to return (1-50: Maximum number of drafts to return (1-50).
The ID of the draft to delete.
The media file to upload (image, video,: The media file to upload (image, video, GIF, or PDF).
Authorization headers are injected autom: 授权头自动从您的连接中注入。
Enable for files like PDFs, images, etc.
HEAD: 黑色
Triggers when a specific webhook event i: Triggers when a specific webhook event is received from Typefully.
\n1. In Typefully, go to **Settings → AP:
1. In Typefully, go to **Settings → API**.
2. Go to the **Webhooks** section and click **Add webhook**.
3. Paste the following URL into the webhook endpoint field:
```text
{{webhookUrl}}
```
4. Select the events you want to receive and click **Save**.
The Typefully event to listen for.
